meaning: adj.(法国宗教改革者)加尔文主义的,加尔文教派的
examples: This was not an issue as to whether they were Calvinistic in their soteriology, but an issue over their eschatology.
But the Calvinistic concept of "limited atonement" whichsome have been indoctrinated with, doesn't go along with thisreasoning, as also is the case with a number of other concepts inCalvinism.
Those courses are from the Calvinistic tradition.
